# n attribute: metarule only matches file targets, not virtual-only ones.
# The %.o metarule with n only matches when %.c exists on disk.
mk -n -p 1 -f mkfile
cmp stdout expected

-- mkfile --
%.o:n: %.c
	compile $stem.c
all:V: foo.o
	echo done
-- foo.c --
source code
-- expected --
foo.o: compile foo.c
all: echo done
